name: FAI_SAM_ONE_VIEW_PROCESS
description: This table holds the denormalized  processes data

columns.Name: ONE_VIEW_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of One View Process Table

columns.Name: OBJECT_KEY
columns.Comments: Key of the Object in One View Process

columns.Name: PROCESS_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the Process in One View Process

columns.Name: PROCESS_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the Process in One View Process

columns.Name: ID_METRIC
columns.Comments: Request Id of the Process in One View Process

columns.Name: PARENT_ID_METRIC
columns.Comments: Id of the parent process in One View Process

columns.Name: PROCESS_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the Process in One View Process

columns.Name: LOAD
columns.Comments: Number Of Record in Process in One View Process

columns.Name: LOAD_SUCCESS
columns.Comments: Number of record successfully uploaded in One View Process

columns.Name: LOAD_ERROR
columns.Comments: Number of Record loaded in Error by the process

columns.Name: PROCESSING_TIME
columns.Comments: Time of the Processing in One View Process

columns.Name: THREAD_COUNT
columns.Comments: Threadcount of the process in One View Process

columns.Name: DAY
columns.Comments: Day of the process in One View Process

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start Time of the Process in One View Process

columns.Name: STOP_TIME
columns.Comments: Stop Time of the Process in One View Process

columns.Name: PRODUCT
columns.Comments: Product associated to the Process in One View Process

columns.Name: RAW_DATA_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to either raw process tables

columns.Name: PARAMETER
columns.Comments: Parameter of the process in One View Process

columns.Name: PARAMETER_COMBINE
columns.Comments: More Process Parameter in One View Process

columns.Name: ANOMALY_LOOP
columns.Comments: Loop back to the AI on accuracy of the detection

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES Table

columns.Name: POD
columns.Comments: Internal Column Apex Version FAPOD in FA

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
